Benchmark Comparison

B&H Fixed: 1 contract, held entire period — same position size as strategy. B&H Compounding: starts at same capital, buys floor(equity / notional) contracts each session open — the fair comparison against a compounding strategy. Both benchmarks pay the same entry slippage and commission as the strategy. Neither pays exit costs (held to end of data).
